description_long: This helmet features a sleek, metallic gold finish with a rounded dome shape and prominent wing-like extensions on either side, reminiscent of art deco or retro-futuristic design. The surface is adorned with a series of parallel black lines radiating from the front center, adding a sense of motion and symmetry. Along the top and sides, small circular perforations form a decorative and possibly functional ventilation pattern. The wings are detailed with cut-out segments and layered ridges, giving the helmet a distinctive, ornamental appearance. The overall construction appears solid and smooth, with no visible visor or retention system. The helmet's design is both striking and functional, suitable for display or use in a stylized urban environment.
description: A metallic gold helmet with wing-like side extensions, black linear accents, and decorative perforations, exuding a retro-futuristic style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded dome, central black lines, and symmetrical wing-like extensions.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curved profile, wing detail, and the pattern of circular perforations along the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth gold surface, the back of the wings, and the continuation of the perforation pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the wing structure and decorative cut-outs.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Multiple small circular perforations arranged in rows along the top and sides of the helmet, evenly distributed and forming a decorative pattern.
attribute_graphic_design: Black linear accents radiating from the front center, with wing-like side extensions and decorative cut-outs; no additional graphics or text.
